case_title: JIMMIE LEE GILVARD VS. ALICE MARIE SMITH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY GILVARD, JIMMIE LEE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, ALICE MARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
